evidence: "Not a typical western and I loved it!"
"I love stories about the Civil War and especially if based on true events as is this one."
"It was one of those movies you don't want to miss a second and I never would have guessed the ending."
"I got bored with the storyline and cut it off!"
"I was in awe of the constant action in this movie..."
"The director got everything right - even the townspeople, sheriff, swamp, music, etc."
"Guy Pearce was fantastic in this movie!"
"I love all of her movies because she takes the character and develops it into herself."
"The cars, clothing, town, and farmhouses were beautiful."
"It has everything you can expect or imagine that could go on in a small southern town."
"I could feel the character she was portraying and never even saw Nicole Kidman in the character."

summary: The user enjoys well-crafted films, particularly in the western and historical drama genres, with a strong appreciation for quality acting and production. They have a mixed response to narrative complexity and pacing, indicating a preference for engaging stories but can be critical of slow or monotonous plots.
